description: Baseline permissions for the AetherCloud Setup wizard main window. Enforces PR #57 (tauri.conf.json hardening) — scopes each plugin's default surface down to what the installer actually needs and nothing more. Each permission entry is paired with an explicit allow-scope where the plugin supports it, so a post-compromise RCE in the WebView cannot reach arbitrary files, shells, or hosts. `core:event:default` is required for Tauri v2 to deliver backend-emitted `installer://progress` events to the frontend's listen() calls — without it the UI silently never receives progress updates (the 'Backend not responding' bug from Session E's audit).
